raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Over 60% of community members surveyed will have to find outside community medical centers to receive treatment due to the closure of Madera Community Hospital.",
    "More than 15% of respondents are unsure of where to go for treatment after the hospital's closure.",
    "Over 60% of indigenous farmworkers surveyed were not informed about the closure of Madera Community Hospital.",
    "52% of survey participants do not have a reliable mode of transportation to the nearest hospital.",
    "147 out of 347 surveyed participants will now seek treatment at Community Regional Medical Center in Fresno.",
    "Many survey participants reported extra-long wait times at outside community hospitals.",
    "There is a lack of public transportation available to travel to outside community hospitals."
  ]
}
```
